summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stockholm bus search app with 4 new features: transport mode filtering, nearby stops with geolocation, recent search history, and stop name disambiguation with locality. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/stops/search returns stops with locality field (e.g., Botkyrka, Nacka)
Backend: /api/nearby returns nearby stops with distance calculation
Frontend: Search results display locality in parentheses after stop names
Frontend: Transport mode filter buttons (Alla, Buss) appear on departures board
Frontend: Clicking transport mode filters successfully filters departures
Frontend: Recent searches appear when clicking search bar with locality display
Frontend: 'Nära mig' tab exists with 'Hitta nära mig' button
Frontend: Trip planner autocomplete shows locality in results
Frontend: Favorites section properly implemented with locality support
